name: Hearty Tortellini Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine mushrooms, onions, carrots, zucchini, olive oil, and garlic. Stir to coat.
2. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 6 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking.
3. Add remaining ingredients except tortellini. Stir to combine.
4. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 6 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking.
5. Add tortellini and stir to combine. Cover and microwave on Medium for 5 minutes.
6. Let stand for 5 minutes, stirring after 3 minutes, until tortellini are soft.
Per serving: 1 Fat, 1 Protein, 5 Vegetables, 1 Bread, 40 Optional Calories
288 Calories, 8 g Fat
